title: 2022 Press Releases
summary: This is a chronological index page listing all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2022, including FOMC minutes, regulatory announcements, enforcement actions, banking application approvals, and other Fed communications. It does not contain a single archiveable document but rather serves as a navigation hub to individual press releases.
key_points: Listing page containing links to multiple Fed press releases from throughout 2022
Includes references to FOMC minutes releases (November 1-2, September 20-21, July 26-27 meetings)
Contains regulatory actions including LIBOR transition final rule and climate-related risk guidance
Lists discount rate action announcements from multiple Reserve Banks
Includes enforcement action terminations and new enforcement actions
References banking application approvals and master account proposal
why_it_matters: This page is not directly actionable for market research as it is merely an index. Individual press releases linked from this page would need to be retrieved separately for meaningful analysis.

issues_found: suggested_status should be 'rejected' instead of 'review_queue' since source_type is listing_page per CORE RULE 5

notes: This source is a Federal Reserve press release index/listing page for calendar year 2022. It contains links to dozens of separate announcements but is not itself an archiveable document. Per CORE RULE 6, listing_page sources should be treated as non-archiveable. The actual substantive documents (FOMC minutes, rate decisions, regulatory actions) would need to be accessed individually. Source is historical (2022 data); content is stale relative to TODAY (2026-03-31). Low confidence in utility as standalone research record.
